caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a background of dark grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt, and tattoos are visible on his right arm. Positioned closely in front of him is a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, featuring the legible text "Rode Procaster". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his facial expressions shifting as he talks. In the beginning, he maintains a neutral expression while speaking, then opens his mouth wider to emphasize a point. He then glances slightly to his right with a small smile before returning his gaze forward to continue speaking. The camera remains static, focusing on the man's head and shoulders as he interacts with someone off-screen.
